title: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path_text: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
summary:
Main
Dry Cargo
Following the slower activity during Bahri Week in Dubai, the S&P market has gained traction, especially in the dry segment.Several transactions have been concluded, with the below being the most notable ones. To begin with, on the larger sizes, the Mini-cape NBA REMBRANDT (ABT 107KDWT, 2012, OSHIMA) was sold for a price of USD 18.7 mill., to clients of GCL Shipping. Furthermore, on the Panamax sector, a new sale of a Japanese vessel has emerged, the YASA UNITY (ABT 75KDWT, 2006, SANOYAS HISHINO), which was reported sold to undisclosed buyers at low USD 9 mill., while, on the Ultramax sector, the SANTA MARIA (ABT 61KDWT, 2014, IWAGI ZOSEN) achieved levels of low USD 21 mill.
